As a product designer
I want global token and stylesheet loading at the app root
So that every module starts from one visual system

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Global styles import the shared token files.
- [ ] Module-level CSS can build on top of the shared token layer.

Notes: Token coverage looks broad, but visual parity was not exhaustively rechecked.
